-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry by kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas within Kristiansand municipality geometry

3.description: get 200-year flood zones within Kristiansand municipality geometry

4.description: get parcels in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

6.description: find parcels from step 5 intersecting flood zones

7.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teig
